question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?animal ?animalLabel
WHERE
{
  ?animal wdt:P798 ?militaryDesignation .
  ?militaryUnit wdt:P7779 ?militaryDesignation .
  ?militaryUnit wdt:P4624 ?squadron .
  ?squadron wdt:P793 ?operation .
  ?operation wdt:P710 ?defenceForce .
  ?defenceForce wdt:P361* wd:Q625657 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
  FILTER (exists(?animal))
}

question.string: among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?stateLabel
WHERE {
  ?brooke wdt:P569 ?brookeBirth ; wdt:P27 ?brookeCountry ; wdt:P131 ?brookeState .
  ?colin wdt:P569 ?colinBirth ; wdt:P27 ?colinCountry ; wdt:P131 ?colinState .
  FILTER (?brooke = wd:Q105713880 && ?colin = wd:Q110994531) .
  FILTER (?brookeCountry = ?colinCountry) .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState) .
  ?brookeState rdfs:label ?stateLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?stateLabel), "en"))
}

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?
At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?
Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?
On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?platform
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q788449.
  ?game wdt:P404 ?gameMode.
  ?game wdt:P3195 ?leaguePoints.
  ?game wdt:P6229 ?discordStore.
  ?platform wdt:P31 wd:Q206695.
  ?game wdt:P400 ?platform.
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?game), "Don't Starve"))
}

question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?
How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?president p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q191954 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startTime .
  FILTER (?startTime > "1990-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?medal
WHERE {
  ?athlete wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?athlete wdt:P735 "Adam Ondra" .
  ?competition wdt:P31 wd:Q12816106 .
  ?competition wdt:P577 "2020-07-23"^^xsd:date .
  ?athlete wdt:P2522 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P361 ?competition .
}

question.string: Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?
Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lebronStart ?kobeEnd
WHERE {
  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?lebronMembership .
  ?lebronMembership ps:P54 wd:Q85 .
  ?lebronMembership pq:P580 ?lebronStart .

  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?kobeMembership .
  ?kobeMembership ps:P54 wd:Q85 .
  ?kobeMembership pq:P582 ?kobeEnd .

  FILTER (?lebronStart <= ?kobeEnd)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?founder wdt:P112f ?tencent .
  ?tencent wdt:P161 ?company .
  FILTER (?company = "Tencent")
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?partner ?nativeLanguage
WHERE {
  wd:Q123096 bind(wd:Q123096 as ?batman) .
  ?partner wdt:P451 ?batman .
  ?partner wdt:P103 ?nativeLanguage .
  FILTER (NOT EXISTS { ?nativeLanguage wdt:P305 "en" . })
}

question.string: How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE
{
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190020 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?genreLabel
WHERE {
  wd:Q158895 wdt:P136 ?genre .
  ?genre rdfs:label ?genreLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?genreLabel), "en")) .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?genreLabel), "rock")) .
}

WHERE {
  wd:Q42053 p:P36 ?capitalStatement .

  ?capitalStatement pq:P580 ?start .

}

question.string: Was Shaquille O'Neal the teammate of Kobe Bryant in the year of 2000?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?year
WHERE {
  ?player1 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?player2 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?player1 wdt:P569 ?dob1 .
  ?player2 wdt:P569 ?dob2 .
  FILTER (?player1 = wd:Q41488) .
  FILTER (?player2 = wd:Q40312) .
  FILTER (YEAR(?year) = 2000) .
  BIND(YEAR(?year) AS ?year) .
  ?team wdt:P54 ?player1 .
  ?team wdt:P54 ?player2
}

question.string: Was Shaquille O'Neal, as the basketball player, also an film actor?
Was the first album of the band Darkside released in 2012?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?releaseYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q124051775 p:P9831 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P9831 ?release .
  ?release wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  BIND(YEAR(?releaseDate) AS ?releaseYear) .
  FILTER(?releaseYear = 2013) .
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?statement pq:P693 ?previousRelease .
                     ?previousRelease wdt:P577 ?previousReleaseDate .
                     FILTER(?previousReleaseDate < ?releaseDate) })
}

question.string: What are the spin-offs of Breaking Bad?

What did the suffragettes stand for?
What do you call a female form of an emperor in English?
What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P20 ?place .
  ?event wdt:P1465 ?place .
  ?person wdt:P570 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1910 && YEAR(?date) <= 1920)
}
GROUP BY ?event
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

  wd:Q1976204 wdt:P2743 ?zodiacOrder .
  ?ox wdt:P4743 wd:Q28964924 .
  ?ox wdt:P2743 ?oxOrder .
  ?animal wdt:P4743 ?animalBreed .
  ?animal wdt:P2743 ?animalOrder .
  FILTER (?animalOrder = ?oxOrder + 1) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}

question.string: What is the combined total revenue of three largest Big Tech companies ordered by number of employees?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?company ?revenue (SUM(?revenue) AS ?totalRevenue)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P31 wd:Q483838 .
  ?company wdt:P2139 ?revenue .
  ?company wdt:P112 ?employees .
  FILTER (?company IN (wd:Q95, wd:Q379417, wd:Q379388)) .
}
GROUP BY ?company ?revenue
ORDER BY DESC(?employees)
LIMIT 3

How many perople do the Port of Rotterdam employ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?worker) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  wd:Q34370 wdt:P1641 ?item .
  ?item wdt:P3989 ?occupation .
  ?worker wdt:P106 ?occupation .
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

question.string: what is the main subject of the manga "your lie in april": primary school, middle school or high school student?
What is the mother tongue of the author Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie ?
Who was the partner of Allen Ginsberg?
What is the second game developed by Piranha Bytes?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?gameLabel
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P178 ?developer .
  ?developer wdt:P735 "Piranha Bytes"@en .
  ?game wdt:P577 ?publicationDate .
  {
    SELECT ?game (COUNT(?earlierGame) AS ?earlierGames)
    WHERE {
      ?game wdt:P178 ?developer .
      ?developer wdt:P735 "Piranha Bytes"@en .
      ?game wdt:P577 ?publicationDate .
      ?earlierGame wdt:P178 ?developer .
      ?earlierGame wdt:P577 ?earlierPublicationDate .
      FILTER(?earlierPublicationDate < ?publicationDate) .
    }
    GROUP BY ?game
  }
  FILTER(?earlierGames = 1)
}
ORDER BY ?publicationDate
LIMIT 1
